top_signals.title: Trump tells CNBC: 'I don't care' if Iran negotiations are over
top_signals.summary: President Trump spoke with CNBC's Eamon Javers about the latest with the Iran war in an interview Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Protesters March in Tirana as PM Defends Kushner Resort
top_signals.summary: Protesters marched in Albania’s capital against a €4 billion ($4.7 billion) luxury resort linked to Jared Kushner, the son-in-law of US President Donald Trump, as opposition widened over the project’s environmental impact and land ownership.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Saia’s tonnage growth accelerates in May on easier comp
top_signals.summary:
Saia is poised for larger tonnage increases as its prior-year comparisons ease and demand appears to be firming.

top_signals.title: Labour backbench MPs say McFadden’s messages have not derailed welfare reform
top_signals.summary: The Tories have seized on messages from the work and pensions secretary to claim taxes are being raised to pay benefits
